variable.description: The integer ID of the organisation to retrieve

request.description: Returns the details of a single organisation by its ID. Returns 404 if no organisation with the given ID exists.

response.name: 200 OK - Organisation found
response.body:
{
  "id": 1,
  "organisationName": "Example Pharma Ltd",
  "organisationType": 0,
  "allowedPharmaceuticalEntity": 3,
  "countryOrRegion": "United Kingdom",
  "headOfficeAddressLine1": "123 Example Street",
  "headOfficeAddressLine2": "Floor 4",
  "headOfficeTown": "London",
  "headOfficeCounty": "Greater London",
  "headOfficePostcode": "EC1A 1BB",
  "headOfficeEmail": "contact@examplepharma.co.uk",
  "headOfficeTelephone": "+44 20 7946 0000",
  "status": 1,
  "lastActive": "2026-06-01T09:00:00Z",
  "createdAt": "2025-01-15T10:30:00Z"
}

response.name: 404 Not Found - Organisation does not exist

variable.description: The integer ID of the organisation to update

request.description: Fully replaces the editable organisation details for the given ID. Address line 2 and county are optional.

response.name: 200 OK - Organisation updated
response.body:
{
  "id": 1,
  "organisationName": "Example Pharma Ltd",
  "organisationType": 0,
  "allowedPharmaceuticalEntity": 3,
  "countryOrRegion": "United Kingdom",
  "headOfficeAddressLine1": "123 Example Street",
  "headOfficeAddressLine2": "Floor 4",
  "headOfficeTown": "London",
  "headOfficeCounty": null,
  "headOfficePostcode": "EC1A 1BB",
  "headOfficeEmail": "contact@examplepharma.co.uk",
  "headOfficeTelephone": "+44 20 7946 0000",
  "status": 1,
  "lastActive": "2026-06-01T09:00:00Z",
  "createdAt": "2025-01-15T10:30:00Z"
}

response.name: 400 Bad Request - Validation failed
404 Not Found - Organisation does not exist
